Welcome to Wyoming County, PA, USA
The official
Wyoming County America 250 Fundraiser
T-shirt store is open again!
Order online through The Finan Detail
and wear your shirt to celebrate America’s 250th.
Online ordering is only open through Sunday, August 2, 2026
, so
TIME IS RUNNING OUT
to grab yours.
BUY NOW
Notices & News
LAST CHANCE: Show Your County Pride — Order Your America 250 T-Shirt
July 22, 2026
in
Community
The official Wyoming County America 250 Fundraiser T-shirt is on sale now — order online through Sunday, August 2, 2026.
Read More
Household Hazardous Waste Disposal Event August 1st, Register Now
July 21, 2026
in
News
Wyoming County’s
FREE Household Hazardous Waste Disposal Event
is now open for registration.
Date:
Saturday, August 1, 2026 — 8:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.
Location:
Wyoming County Recycling Center
Who:
Wyoming County residents only — this event is FREE.
Pre-registration is required.
You will be given a specific drop-off time when you register.
Register by July 31, 2026, or until all time slots are filled.
View full details and register →
Commissioners Meeting, Tuesday, July 21, 2026 at , Wyoming County Courthouse, 2nd Floor or by zoom
July 20, 2026
